name: Christina Finello
subject: LAST CHANCE - Join Broadway Artists this Sunday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
Hi Peter ,
I am personally reaching out to invite you to our one of kind zoom event in support of my campaign. Join us this SUNDAY, October 4th at 5:30pm!

Join Broadway artists,

Ryan Vasquez
(Hamilton, Wicked, Waitress)

Jennifer Apple,
(The Brand's Visit),

&

Megan Haley
(Mean Girls, WIcked)

For an evening of performances and discussion with some of Broadway's finest!

To RSVP, please visit: http://Finello.vote/hamilton

Any questions, feel free to reach out to Stephanie, stephanie@finelloforcongress.com

I look forward to seeing you!

Christina

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/76523/images/hamilton.jpg]RSVP HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/10.4hamilton]
Paid for by Finello for Congress
Finello for Congress
P.O. Box 2772
Warminster, PA 18974
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9da7c47c-7505-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc/d1968a5b-7805-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTk2OGE1Yi03ODA1LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiQP9b1PV2qNEpNwC5-_fvkHdQznKqUEYLp1oC7R6P8=&id=114259036 .

I know I have your support, but this race is tough and it requires a lot of work and a lot of resources, but I know we can do it -- together.
Friend,

It’s official: **We are only one month away from Election Day!**

As we head into the final stretch of this election, it is more important than ever to show our campaign’s strength. I know I have your support, but this race is tough and it requires a lot of work and a lot of resources, but I know we can do it -- together.

**Together, we can show that a grassroots campaign built on what unites us, rather than what divides us, has the power to win.**

**[Our opponent and national Republican groups are looking for any weakness they can find in our campaign, and we need to show them our strength. body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bi_68io7Tm1eZ3rBC9UQ5w==/gNodp91s4y8imcJSMfjvZA==?midqs=oAeThrgK-v9QmYgZYeMaUA==)
---

**FROM THE TEAM**

Good Morning,

Every campaign is a team effort. There are two easy ways to help Team Carney today:
1. **Register to vote: **There's only one week left to register to vote. Visit [ivote.de.gov](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bi_68io7Tm1eZ3rBC9UQ5w==/SCNqtCzLwsan0GzTLWjFxw==) to check your registration status and to register to vote by mail. Do you have a plan?
2. **Chip in: **Today marks a critical fundraising deadline for the campaign -- can you [chip in](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bi_68io7Tm1eZ3rBC9UQ5w==/gNodp91s4y8imcJSMfjvZA==) to support Governor Carney's campaign?

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bi_68io7Tm1eZ3rBC9UQ5w==/SCNqtCzLwsan0GzTLWjFxw==)

Thanks for the continued support,

subject: Get Well Soon, Mr. President!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Yesterday, we learned President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump tested positive for COVID-19. Our fellow Hoosiers, Vice President Mike | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/elections-powered-by-you-469794?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

| Hoosier Republican,

Yesterday, we learned President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump tested positive for COVID-19. Our fellow Hoosiers, Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence, have both tested negative.

We know that their recovery will be powered by the prayers of millions of Americans — Republicans, Democrats, Independents — who want our First Family, and all suffering from COVID-19, to recover quickly.

**That’s why we’re sending you this note. Will you sign our card and join us in wishing President Trump and First Lady Melania a speedy recover?**
[-> Click Here to Sign Our Card <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e7839d50e0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
We know our president will keep working hard for our country, even as he safely quarantines due to the virus! So let’s send him some good wishes during this time. Get well soon, President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump! Hoosiers throughout our state are praying for you.

-Your Indiana Republican Party
---

name: TX Battleground (via MJ Hegar)
subject: A spineless bootlicker or an ass kicker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
It's time to set the record straight, Peter.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba0c5/3896786156/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter -- **We've got 31 days** until Texans decide what kind of leader they want: a **spineless bootlicker** or an **ass kicker**.

That's 31 days of hard work getting MJ's message out there to as many undecided Texans as possible.

**It's 31 days of setting Sen. Cornyn's health care record straight -- of reminding Texans that:**
* Sen. Cornyn was the **chief salesman behind repealing the Affordable Care Act** , and he still calls for it to be repealed in the midst of the worst pandemic in at least a century
* Repealing the ACA would cut protections for people with pre-existing conditions (including COVID-19) and leave millions uninsured
* Repealing the ACA would even allow insurance companies to charge women higher premiums than men!

| [Pitch in to protect the ACA](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba0c4/3896786156/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?refcode=email_20201003.1nd__2236__&amount=10")
---
**It's 31 days of setting Sen. Cornyn's immigration record straight:**
* He voted AGAINST bills supporting Dreamers in 2006, 2007, 2010, 2013, 2015, and 2018
* He supported diverting military funds and taking possession of Texans' private property to build an impractical, worthless wall along the border

[Donate to protect Dreamers](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba0c4/3896786156/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?refcode=email_20201003.1nd__2236__&amount=10")
---
**It's 31 days of showing Texans that Sen. Cornyn works not for them, but for special interests:**
* Corporate PACs have spent $11 MILLION on Sen. Cornyn
* He's taken almost $1.9 MILLION from the insurance industry alone
* He's taken almost $1.4 MILLION from Big Pharma
* The Koch network has spent $4 MILLION in Texas to try to keep him in office
* He consistently votes in favor of special interests (after taking their money) and against Texans

**[Donate to elect a senator who'll represent the PEOPLE of Texas.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba0c4/3896786156/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?refcode=email_20201003.1nd__2236__&amount=10")**

We only have 31 days, and we have a lot of information to get out there before people make up their minds. **Will you pitch in and help us hit our $75,000 goal, defeat Sen. Cornyn, and elect MJ one month from today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba13b/3896786156/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201003.1nd__2236__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba13a/3896786156/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201003.1nd__2236__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba139/3896786156/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201003.1nd__2236__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba138/3896786156/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201003.1nd__2236__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba13f/3896786156/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?refcode=email_20201003.1nd__2236__")**
It means the world to have you on our team, Peter.
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba0c4/3896786156/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?refcode=email_20201003.1nd__2236__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba13e/3896786156/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2236&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd6/7f51f7bc/44f9f6c2/4efba13d/3896786156/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The far-left thinks American values are "extremist"
body:
Is free speech “extremist”?

The far-left thinks so... and that’s why they’re in an all-out push to silence conservatives like me.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395821-932220-5223604-814f804cd8-50c9871034)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395821-932220-5223604-814f804cd8-50c9871034) Is free speech “extremist”?

The far-left thinks so... and that’s why they’re in an all-out push to silence conservatives like me.

I’m fighting back. I need your help to win this seat in Congress.

[**Will you pitch in $10, $25, or even $50 to help my campaign continue to surge?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395821-932220-5223604-814f804cd8-50c9871034)

[**Please make your most generous donation now.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395821-932220-5223604-814f804cd8-50c9871034)

Believing in free speech, supporting freedom of religion, legally buying a firearm, defending life... these are all some of the most basic freedoms you and I hold dear.

**The far-left is recasting each and every one of those things as “extremist.”**

Meanwhile, “the right” to burn down small businesses, to divide Americans by race, to violently assault people who don’t agree with them... they call that “progress.”

I’ll be honest: if conservatives lose in 2020, we will lose our country forever... because the far-left has made it clear they will lie, cheat, and violate the Constitution to stay in power.

I’m ready to go to Washington to be the biggest enemy of the radical left. **But I need your support to make it there.**

[**Please pitch in $10, $25, or even $50 right away to help me defeat the far-left in November and beyond.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395821-932220-5223604-814f804cd8-50c9871034)

Thanks,

Laura Loomer

name: Tom Cotton
subject: A personal thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
I want to personally thank you for your contribution this past month. Your support allowed me to beat my goal, and I’m entering my reelection campaign in a strong position. In fact, September was a record month for my campaign. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2MDUxMzUS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDIzMDg1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

I want to personally thank you for your contribution this past month. Your support allowed me to beat my goal, and I’m entering my reelection campaign in a strong position. In fact, September was a record month for my campaign.

Our country is at a crossroads and I'm going to do what I can to stand up to the liberal mob and help re-elect President Trump to serve us for four more years.

I am so grateful for your support.

Donate http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2MDUxMzUS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDIzMDg1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 In service, http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2MDUxMzUS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDIzMDg1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Tom Cotton http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2MDUxMzUS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDIzMDg1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0

**We are entering the final countdown - the general election is just _one month_ away.**

But here’s the honest truth: We can’t do it without you, friend.

**We need grassroots support now more than ever. Can we count on you to pitch in a few hours - or a few dollars - in these critical final days of the campaign?**

subject: One month to go. Can you help us down the stretch?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d10c261400d0/one-month-to-go-can-you-help-us-down-the-stretch?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
We have one month to go before Election Day, and we need your help to finish strong! Your help so far has put us in a position to win this race, and now**we need all hands on deck to get the job done. **

Sign up to help us down the stretch by [clicking here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=120708a99f&e=140a9b81e7). You can help us by phonebanking, dropping lit in priority areas for the campaign, and by writing a letter to the editor!

We also need Election Day volunteers! We need volunteers to stand outside of key polling places in the district and distribute our lit to voters. This is critical to our success since **it is the last opportunity we have to get Dani's message out before these voters cast their ballots.** If you're able to help us out on Election Day, please let us know!

Can we count on you to help us get out our message during the final month of the campaign, and on Election Day? [Click here to sign up](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2a72ed6d02&e=140a9b81e7), and **forward this email to your friends to let them know we need their help as well!**

Thank you so much for your support that has gotten us this far. Now, let's finish strong!

Team Dani

name: =?utf-8?Q?Haley=20=2D=20Team=20Dani?=
subject: My story
body:
My name is Haley, and I’ve been hard at work all summer as an intern with Team Dani! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b8ef1619fcf1/my-story?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
My name is Haley, and I’ve been hard at work all summer as an intern with Team Dani!

The 16th district is my home - I’ve lived here my entire life. I grew up in McHenry County and moved into Boone County before the district was redrawn to create the one we know today. I moved as the district moved and I’m proud to call Northern Illinois home.

Living in the 16th district also means I’ve _never_ had a representative who stands for the same things that I do. My parents are educators, so I was raised in a union home. However, my representative has a disastrous record on workers' rights. The very things my parents fought for in their union work - better benefits, paid sick leave, maternity and paternity leave, and health insurance - Adam Kinzinger voted **against** every year he went back to Congress.

It’s truly demoralizing to have a representative who actively works against his constituents. That is why I was so excited to join Team Dani this past spring. **Dani is the candidate I’ve been waiting for.** She is a stubborn and determined woman with the sort of grit we deserve fighting for us in Washington.

Dani got into this race to help people. You could’ve called the campaign a long shot a year ago. After all, this district has been red for longer than I’ve been alive. **But Dani is proving every naysayer wrong.**

I’ve been on the phone for months, calling voters across the district, and I can tell you firsthand about the excitement voters have for Dani. **We have a real shot to send Dani to Congress this November, but only if we keep our foot on the pedal. I should know - I live here, after all.**

[Will you chip in with a donation to show Adam that the 16th has seen enough from him and that we’re ready for new representation in Congress?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=8a3cf69685&e=140a9b81e7)

Haley
Dani for Illinois

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: we just made pro-life history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Thanks to Governor Holcomb's leadership, Indiana's infant mortality rate just fell to the LOWEST level EVER recorded in our state’s history. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

**We have amazing news. **

Thanks to Governor Holcomb's leadership, Indiana's infant mortality rate just fell to the LOWEST level EVER recorded in our state’s history.

We’ve taken direct and impactful action to protect our state’s most vulnerable citizens, including:
* Implementing Levels of Care certification for perinatal programs at hospitals and birthing centers to ensure that mothers and babies get care at a facility with a level of care that matches their risk.
* Expanding the Nurse-Family Partnership Program to combat infant mortality rates.
* Starting Indiana’s OB Navigator program that connects pregnant women in Indiana’s highest-risk ZIP codes with wraparound health services.

There’s still work to do on this front, but this news is wonderful for our state. It’s just the latest pro-life success story from the Holcomb administration, coming on the heels of the big news that Indiana leads the nation in adoptions out of foster care!
[**Spread the good news on Facebook**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f147d5631b8a40d6bc92d3b3dec466b3&_e=9U8w3tdR4UM31dHj3ivUorzULpz6nfI1JxTuAO4UmHjBN4l-YnJIzBBq0Cdak2-gdGf3EHXyzI-9IpXI6rPopqcBVl_-jVZkfNLIUUb0L_DVx4valL7fI4KVlEbuYm7PntH6mzp_vrJpLm6XCRCNAbZrZ5N4tfEeoUHwkF7_ptbdo3zCCPt7kfEJPXkHwJoCpvq9hf60MSqp1wX4wM92RipPGMVgVA2FYGkLy2h_E-2Uig25_kSOjVPlgzj2J8nXOVjVwW1aqk64Ekslcn09rStYga40_RRQaS6WtrJic8iNWdoSrze7ZbWby3XVAIGbgyYnmy3N38blPhQy8rbvQVhIgTx8mbHHZX7Ux8sv8PHn5yFyRUq2nm88N7DxQd02o1tW2_nCj-2yuaNKKK4cc5ldiZptPz-mrxouXiHNuyDyRN4Ty2gdr15X3PcG9tPjUwSjKnLmNgDtGkIwdgpJkdfYrhbBi3e77dIfE0DQPSA%3D)
_”We are committed to ensuring the best chance for a healthy pregnancy and a strong start to life for Indiana’s newborns. While we celebrate these results, our work is far from finished, and we won’t rest as we work to protect our youngest.” - Governor Eric Holcomb_
Friend, Indiana has seen amazing results thanks to Governor Holcomb’s leadership, including three straight years of decline in our infant mortality rate. It’s now at its lowest level since 1900 - the first year Indiana started recording infant mortality rates!
_“We’ve known all along that reducing Indiana’s infant mortality rate would take time and partnerships, and it’s gratifying to see that work pay off. We must continue to encourage early prenatal care and promote safe sleep practices so that we can celebrate more first birthdays in Indiana.” - State Health Commissioner Kris Box, M.D., FACOG_
Governor Holcomb has made reducing Indiana’s infant mortality rate a priority, with the goal of achieving the lowest infant mortality rate in the Midwest by 2024.
[**Spread the good news on Facebook**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f147d5631b8a40d6bc92d3b3dec466b3&_e=9U8w3tdR4UM31dHj3ivUorzULpz6nfI1JxTuAO4UmHjBN4l-YnJIzBBq0Cdak2-gdGf3EHXyzI-9IpXI6rPopqcBVl_-jVZkfNLIUUb0L_DVx4valL7fI4KVlEbuYm7PntH6mzp_vrJpLm6XCRCNAbZrZ5N4tfEeoUHwkF7_ptbdo3zCCPt7kfEJPXkHwJoCpvq9hf60MSqp1wX4wM92RipPGMVgVA2FYGkLy2h_E-2Uig25_kSOjVPlgzj2J8nXOVjVwW1aqk64Ekslcn09rUBI2XuyNXLiV7Z3w01A04Bux8Yg-rLeDqqrjLicBfkqHOCOoicPKX6Q5Bj68kUfWwooySkKWNhvVuU-jXgYTE0_TjPMk5XXrTjWAMk0hnoeMcfUHMbsR6RiFXSluXRpTmZL3LUOnkROWNBYKjKss1KqudM6vc9Vy7hdI8Ebwm2boQKSWFpt2POv0L0lMBdHAhs4CKFW8ZVF6CYNs9uWTTc%3D)
Under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, Indiana has taken the following steps to improve infant and maternal health in recent years, including:
* Creating an obstetrician-gynecologist navigator program that provides personalized support, resources, and referrals to mothers through the first year of their babies’ lives.
* Developing a Levels of Care system for birthing hospitals to ensure that women deliver their babies at the facility that best meets their needs.
* Adopting obstetrical safety bundles through the Alliance for Innovation on Maternal Health
* Allocating more than $27 million in Safety PIN grants since 2017 to community partners for both novel and evidence-based programs to reduce infant mortality and improve the health and well-being of mothers and babies.
* Requiring prenatal care providers to conduct a verbal screening for substance use disorder for all pregnant women so they can receive services that improve their health and that of their babies.
* Establishing a committee to review every maternal death in the state, with the goal of understanding the causes and developing strategies to prevent future cases.

Thank you for reading - help us spread the good news by sharing our video below on Facebook!
[**Spread the good news on Facebook**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f147d5631b8a40d6bc92d3b3dec466b3&_e=9U8w3tdR4UM31dHj3ivUorzULpz6nfI1JxTuAO4UmHjBN4l-YnJIzBBq0Cdak2-gdGf3EHXyzI-9IpXI6rPopqcBVl_-jVZkfNLIUUb0L_DVx4valL7fI4KVlEbuYm7PntH6mzp_vrJpLm6XCRCNAbZrZ5N4tfEeoUHwkF7_ptbdo3zCCPt7kfEJPXkHwJoCpvq9hf60MSqp1wX4wM92RipPGMVgVA2FYGkLy2h_E-2Uig25_kSOjVPlgzj2J8nXOVjVwW1aqk64Ekslcn09rSm80iUo5sKeM9UJKoRE9JDsgyXxysRnKK20NavDwdPrZsPK2o_hBX2snWHODoEu4ZEMN9pozqOb5WI7pkEwH_mS51TY-4mwcZtqMHIuLc-AdSUcrlXuufZ89N_dIPuudgnARywI_z5qwVBoLCvJ6zUzTCZho9HMm7XgvSTDQxPDTdzrKGGrJVH9P8eCJUrWGhE15ZRCM4PMESJKQ7pCfjs%3D)
Sincerely,

Holcomb Crew
---

name: POLLING @ Sri 2020
subject: No time left to waste
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Sri Kulkarni tied in the polls!

Election Day is one month away.

We can’t win without your support!

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: This is the home stretch, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
And we're running out of time!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd0/7f51f7bc/44fede5a/4efba152/2634035567/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

It is almost here - **_Election Day is one month away._** In just 31 short days, Texans will vote to decide who will represent them for the next **six years.**

The choice is clear: Mitch McConnell's right hand man, or a combat veteran and working mom who understands the challenges working families deal with every day.

MJ understands the responsibility a senator has, and is prepared to fight tooth and nail for ALL Texans who have been pushed aside by Sen. Cornyn. We're going to leave it all on the field this month, and do everything we can to win. Today, we've set a goal of **raising $75,000 dollars by midnight tonight. Can you help out?** | [DONATE BY MIDNIGHT](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd0/7f51f7bc/44fede5a/4efba151/2634035567/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?refcode=email_20201003.2nd__2234__&amount=10")

Friend,

**We are exactly one month away from Election Day!** This is an important moment for our campaign, and as I reflect on everything we’ve accomplished together, I couldn’t be prouder of this grassroots team.

Look, we are running in one of the most competitive congressional districts in the entire country, and special interests have already dedicated millions of dollars to curb our progress and prop up our opponent. **But I know as long as I have you on my side, we can weather any challenge that comes our way.**

name: Debate Prep (via Mark Warner for VA)
subject: TONIGHT at 5 PM: Mark Warner's second debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark and his GOP opponent take the stage at Norfolk State University.
|
---

| | Derek,

**Mark Warner is about to head onstage for his second debate tonight at Norfolk State University.** Mark's eager to share how he plans to continue the fight for racial justice in the Commonwealth, and across the nation, during Norfolk State's inaugural U.S. Senate debate.

**Debates are key moments in any race.** They can halt a candidate's momentum right in its tracks -- or even help losing candidates quickly close the gap in the final few weeks. **[Will you pitch in before Mark steps on stage to keep this campaign moving in the right direction?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da6b/53d9897e/55baab75/1c88e63f/81436272/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-debate?refcode=20201003_f_1_nd__845__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Heading into this second debate, our team isn't taking anything for granted. Mark won by less than 1% in 2014, **so we know it 's critical that we keep up the grassroots momentum as we head into these final weeks before Election Day.**

The clock is ticking. Hundreds of thousands of Virginians are _already voting_ and millions more will soon cast their ballots. This our chance to decide if we want to move the Commonwealth forward -- we can't afford to cede any ground.

[**If you can, please consider donating today to keep Mark in the Senate and safeguard progress in Virginia.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da6b/53d9897e/55baab75/1c88e63e/81436272/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-debate?refcode=20201003_f_1_nd__845__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")

Thank you,
Team Warner

P.S. Be sure to catch Mark at the second debate tonight! Watch at 5 PM ET on **[Norfolk State University's Facebook page.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da6b/53d9897e/55baab75/1c88e63d/81436272/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.facebook.com/events/723609891521641")**

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da6b/53d9897e/55baab75/1c88e63c/81436272/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-debate?refcode=20201003_f_1_nd__845__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

name: Patty Murray
subject: Dr. Al Gross and Dr. Barbara Bollier
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
During this pandemic and beyond, we need more leaders in the other Washington that will prioritize public health -- not politicize critical issues like affordable health care and COVID-19.
As part of my Sprint to 2020, I am supporting two doctors who will bring a fresh perspective and a scientific, evidence-based approach to the U.S. Senate: Dr. Al Gross and Dr. Barbara Bollier.
**[Will you rush in a $5 contribution now to help elect these doctors to the Senate?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200102-doctor-slate?refcode=em201002i_500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Dr. Al Gross is an independent voice from Alaska who is working to flip this crucial seat -- because working people in Alaska and across the country need a champion on their side. As a doctor, he knows how important it is for families to have access to affordable health care. This is a surprisingly close race in a traditionally conservative state -- and Al can win with our help.
And in Kansas, Dr. Barbara Bollier is a state lawmaker who has dedicated her life and career to helping others. She has been a longtime advocate for expanding Medicaid in her state -- and in the Senate, she will make affordable health care one of her top priorities. A new poll has her ahead of the Republican candidate by 2 points. We need to help Dr. Bollier build on this momentum and widen that lead.
**[I need your help to send Dr. Barbara Bollier and Dr. Al Gross to the Senate in November. Will you split a $5 donation to their campaigns right now?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200102-doctor-slate?refcode=em201002i_500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200102-doctor-slate?refcode=em201002i_500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
** **

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6933b6/22080b68/7a5740c9/46021634/3693678645/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6933b6/22080b68/7a5740c9/4602163b/3693678645/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

subject: One month left
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

We are officially one month out from the November 3rd general election!
---
| [Donate Now](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=db010b980c&e=16fac31a0f "Donate Now")
---
| | | With 31 days until Election Day, there is no time to lose. With a tied race, our opponent is throwing everything she's got at us. [W](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=5d7fbe3ba8&e=16fac31a0f)[ill you help us fight back by chipping in $10?](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=806eb739d4&e=16fac31a0f)

This is our chance. One month from today, all of our hard work will come to fruition. But it's not over yet. We're in the homestretch, and we need your help to beat our radical opponent and flip this district!

[Donate $25, $100 or even $50 today](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=a5577a2014&e=16fac31a0f)

Thank you for your support!

---

Mariannette Miller-Meeks
| | | [ ](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=83e8df17c3&e=16fac31a0f)

name: Defeat Sen. Cornyn (via MJ Hegar)
subject: 31 Days out! One last ask of the day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're running out of time to hit our goal.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd2/7f51f7bc/448b1704/4efba1b7/1958456557/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | We're close to the finish line Peter, and we can't afford to let up --

This grassroots army has gotten us within single digits of winning this race. These next 31 days are the most important of the entire election, and we're going to need you to dig deep. That's why we've set a goal of **raising $75,000 dollars by midnight tonight. [Will you pitch in to help MJ win just one month from today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd2/7f51f7bc/448b1704/4efba1b6/1958456557/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?refcode=email_20201003.3nd__2240__&amount=10")**

MJ isn't taking money from corporate PACs like our **_18-year spineless bootlicker of a senator, John Cornyn._** MJ's here to shake things up by **listening to YOU.**

Here are some things that you can count on a **_combat veteran_** and **_working mom_** to fight for:
* Protections from predatory insurance companies for people with pre-existing conditions
* Common-sense gun safety laws that the majority of Americans, including responsible gun owners, AGREE will make us safer
* Protections for Dreamers and asylum seekers
* Safer workplaces for the essential workers that we rely on during the pandemic
* And so much more

| _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd2/7f51f7bc/448b1704/4efba1b5/1958456557/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201003.3nd__2240__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd2/7f51f7bc/448b1704/4efba1b4/1958456557/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201003.3nd__2240__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd2/7f51f7bc/448b1704/4efba1ab/1958456557/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201003.3nd__2240__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd2/7f51f7bc/448b1704/4efba1aa/1958456557/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201003.3nd__2240__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd2/7f51f7bc/448b1704/4efba1a9/1958456557/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?refcode=email_20201003.3nd__2240__")**
Give us all you've got in these 31 days because MJ will give you all she has for the **NEXT 6 YEARS!**

\-- Team MJ

****[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd2/7f51f7bc/448b1704/4efba1b6/1958456557/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonth?refcode=email_20201003.3nd__2240__&amount=10")****

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd2/7f51f7bc/448b1704/4efba1a8/1958456557/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2240&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd2/7f51f7bc/448b1704/4efba1af/1958456557/VEsHBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
